gene_region.label: IL6 transcribed interval
gene_region.definition: Canonical IL6 genomic interval on GRCh37 / hg19 from Ensembl GRCh37 lookup, aligned to the hg19 coordinate system used by this app.

promoter_review_region.label: Operational promoter review window
promoter_review_region.definition: A practical 1 kb upstream window used by this app to flag promoter-adjacent coverage before the canonical gene interval begins.

promoter_hotspot_region.label: Promoter-associated CpG review window
promoter_hotspot_region.definition: Promoter-proximal CpG-focused span represented by the bundled EPIC subset and used here as the main methylation-review hotspot.

gene_context.gene_summary: IL6 encodes interleukin-6, a pleiotropic inflammatory cytokine. This bundle emphasizes IL-6 receptor/gp130 signaling, JAK-STAT3 activation, acute-phase response, inflammation, and metabolic immune crosstalk.
gene_context.clinical_context: The local IL6 bundle is inflammatory cytokine signaling oriented. Interpret markers through exact allele class, zygosity, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context rather than as stand-alone deterministic calls.
variant_effect_overview: IL6 variants can alter or tag IL-6 receptor/gp130 signaling, JAK-STAT3 activation, acute-phase response, inflammation, and metabolic immune crosstalk; effect direction depends on allele class, tissue, dosage, and biological context.
Common markers, pharmacogenetic alleles, structural events, and high-impact pathogenic variants should be kept separate during interpretation.
gene_context.methylation_interpretation: IL6 methylation should be treated as local regulatory context around a IL-6 receptor/gp130 signaling, JAK-STAT3 activation, acute-phase response, inflammation, and metabolic immune crosstalk gene. Promoter-proximal methylation can support expression-potential review, but it should not replace genotype, RNA, protein, or phenotype data.
methylation_effects: Promoter or first-exon methylation may suggest a more restrained or permissive local expression state for IL6.
Because IL6 biology is tissue and pathway dependent, methylation values are context rather than a stand-alone biomarker.

Combined sequence plus methylation findings are most useful when interpreted against IL-6 receptor/gp130 signaling, JAK-STAT3 activation, acute-phase response, inflammation, and metabolic immune crosstalk.
methylation_condition_research: Epigenetic regulation studies that use IL6 promoter or gene-body methylation as expression-context evidence.
Variant-plus-methylation review for IL-6 receptor/gp130 signaling, JAK-STAT3 activation, acute-phase response, inflammation, and metabolic immune crosstalk.

evidence.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000136244: IL6 coordinate source

biorender_visuals.label: IL6 biochemical figure starter
biorender_visuals.focus: IL6: IL-6 receptor/gp130 signaling, JAK-STAT3 activation, acute-phase response, inflammation, and metabolic immune crosstalk
biorender_visuals.template_title: Intracellular Layout - Receptor Signaling from Plasma Membrane to Nucleus (2)
biorender_visuals.usage_note: BioRender template and icon-library search results are bundled as figure starters. Open the template link in BioRender, then add or replace the listed icons to make a gene-specific biochemical pathway image.

gene_context.concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a IL6 inflammatory cytokine signaling thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to IL-6 receptor/gp130 signaling, JAK-STAT3 activation, acute-phase response, inflammation, and metabolic immune crosstalk and Inflammation and acute-phase response context, Autoimmune and infection association research. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support.

variant_records.clinical_interpretation: rs1800795 (IL6 -174G>C) is curated as a IL6 marker for Inflammation and acute-phase response context, Autoimmune and infection association research. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the IL-6 receptor/gp130 signaling, JAK-STAT3 activation, acute-phase response, inflammation, and metabolic immune crosstalk pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_records.clinical_significance: Curated research and clinical-context marker; external clinical classification is required for diagnostic use.
functional_effects: Can modify or tag IL-6 receptor/gp130 signaling, JAK-STAT3 activation, acute-phase response, inflammation, and metabolic immune crosstalk.
Best interpreted with tissue, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context.
research_context: Use this marker as a IL6 pathway-context signal, not as a stand-alone diagnosis.
Sequence, methylation, expression, and protein data may point in different directions and should be reconciled.
variant_records.methylation_interpretation: Pair rs1800795 (IL6 -174G>C) with IL6 methylation only as local regulatory context; methylation does not prove the variant's biochemical effect.

literature_findings.genotypes: rs1800795 (IL6 -174G>C) or linked IL6 locus genotype states
literature_findings.phenotype: Inflammation and acute-phase response context, Autoimmune and infection association research
literature_findings.finding: The local curation treats rs1800795 (IL6 -174G>C) as a gene-specific marker for Inflammation and acute-phase response context, Autoimmune and infection association research and IL-6 receptor/gp130 signaling, JAK-STAT3 activation, acute-phase response, inflammation, and metabolic immune crosstalk.
